form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd in a small field at this track Bm68 on March 27 over 1400m, slow going neck behind Hurricane Ketut carrying 59kg at $1.60. Before that favourite; won by 2.5 len at Devonport Synthetic Bm68 March 9 over 1350m defeating Whippin Piccadilly with 57.5kg at $2.60. Shapes as a top chance on recent form.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a neck at this track Bm68 March 27 over 1400m in soft going defeating Hartman with 55.5kg at $5. The start before that second last of 7 at this track Cl4 Sw on February 25 over 1400m, 4 len behind Agnete carrying 59kg at $8. He has an excellent record at this venue and can easily do the job again.
